news.t: Chaotic Markets May Offer Compelling Credit Opportunities

overview.description: The BNY Mellon High Yield ETF (BKHY) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Bloomberg US High Yield - Corporate index. The fund is actively managed, seeking total returns by investing in USD-denominated high yield corporate bonds with broad maturities. The fund intends to outperform the Bloomberg US Corporate High Yield Total Return Index. BKHY was launched on Apr 24, 2020 and is issued by BNY Mellon.

data.title: Chaotic Markets May Offer Compelling Credit Opportunities
data.text: When looking at both the domestic and global fixed income markets, to say they are both experiencing a little bit of dispersion right now would be an understatement, to say the least.
